languages.text: "Состав питательного субстрата несбалансирован. Большое количество липидных соединений и сложных аминных цепочек. Тем не менее... органолептические показатели оцениваю как превосходные, хоть подобный способ питания и крайне иррационален". {n}Эоганн с подозрением кладет кусок жареной птицы в рот.{/n} "Крайне приемлемо".

"The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."
languages.original_text: "Состав питательного субстрата несбалансирован. Большое количество липидных соединений и сложных аминных цепочек. "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."

languages.text: «La composición del sustrato de nutrientes no está equilibrada. Detecto grandes cantidades de heterolípidos y cadenas de aminoácidos complejas. Y sin embargo... sus propiedades organolépticas son excepcionales, aunque lo encuentro harto irracional como método de alimentación». {n}Eogunn se mete con recelo un trozo de ave asada en la boca.{/n} «Un sabor aceptable».
languages.original_text: "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."

traits.locale_text: «La composición del sustrato de nutrientes no está equilibrada. Detecto grandes cantidades de heterolípidos y cadenas de aminoácidos complejas. Y sin embargo... sus propiedades organolépticas son excepcionales, aunque lo encuentro harto irracional como método de alimentación». {n}Eogunn se mete con recelo un trozo de ave asada en la boca.{/n} «Un sabor aceptable».

languages.text: “这种营养基质的成分不均衡，含大量脂质化合物与复杂胺链。不过……虽说这种摄取营养的方式极其违背逻辑，其感官特性却极为优秀。”{n}伊奥贡将信将疑地往嘴里放了块烤禽肉。{/n}“基本可以接受。”
languages.original_text: "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."

traits.locale_text: “这种营养基质的成分不均衡，含大量脂质化合物与复杂胺链。不过……虽说这种摄取营养的方式极其违背逻辑，其感官特性却极为优秀。”{n}伊奥贡将信将疑地往嘴里放了块烤禽肉。{/n}“基本可以接受。”

languages.text: « La composition du substrat de nutriments n'est pas équilibrée. Elle contient une grande quantité de composés lipidiques et de chaînes d'amines complexes. Cependant... elle est excellente sur le plan organoleptique, même si cette façon de se nourrir est hautement irrationnelle. » {n}Eogunn place un morceau de volaille grillée dans sa bouche d'un air sceptique.{/n} « C'est fort acceptable. »
languages.original_text: "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."

traits.locale_text: « La composition du substrat de nutriments n'est pas équilibrée. Elle contient une grande quantité de composés lipidiques et de chaînes d'amines complexes. Cependant... elle est excellente sur le plan organoleptique, même si cette façon de se nourrir est hautement irrationnelle. » {n}Eogunn place un morceau de volaille grillée dans sa bouche d'un air sceptique.{/n} « C'est fort acceptable. »

languages.text: "Besin substratının bileşimi dengesiz. Büyük miktarlarda lipit bileşikleri ve karmaşık amin zincirleri içeriyor. Fakat... Bu beslenme yöntemi son derece mantıksız olsa da organoleptik değerleri mükemmel." {n}Eogunn, kızarmış tavuktan bir parçayı şüpheyle ağzına atıyor.{/n} "Gayet kabul edilebilir."
languages.original_text: "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."

traits.locale_text: "Besin substratının bileşimi dengesiz. Büyük miktarlarda lipit bileşikleri ve karmaşık amin zincirleri içeriyor. Fakat... Bu beslenme yöntemi son derece mantıksız olsa da organoleptik değerleri mükemmel." {n}Eogunn, kızarmış tavuktan bir parçayı şüpheyle ağzına atıyor.{/n} "Gayet kabul edilebilir."

languages.text: 「栄養基質の組成は不均衡です。脂質化合物と複雑なアミン鎖が大量に含まれています。とはいえ……官能的評価値は優秀です。もっとも、この栄養摂取法はきわめて非合理的ではありますが」{n}エオガンは疑わしげに、焼いた鳥肉のひと切れを口に運んだ。{/n}「実に申し分ありません」
languages.original_text: "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."

languages.text: "Die Komposition des Nährstoffsubstrats ist unausgewogen. Zahlreiche Lipidverbindungen und komplexe Aminketten. Allerdings ... sind die organoleptischen Werte exzellent, obschon diese Ernährungsmethode hochgradig irrational ist." {n}Eogunn legt sich zweifelnd ein Stück gebratenes Huhn in den Mund.{/n} "Wirklich akzeptabel."
languages.original_text: "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains.
